## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (test-first where practical)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test` pass
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo test` pass (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages; commits are atomic
- [ ] Respects the three architecture invariants (immutable model, single coordinate seam, pure save) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
